HTTPException: 404: Comparison or base scenario not found

not_touching_real_data.note: passed but no real-db/reference source — pure compute OR still on sample/seed fallbacks (candidates to wire to data)

enhancement_backlog.title: Seed 55 empty tables
enhancement_backlog.detail: Detail/by-id and dashboard endpoints 404 or read NaN because these tables have no rows. Seed representative reference rows so lineage exercises real data end-to-end.

enhancement_backlog.title: Write-path coverage: 661 mutation endpoints untested
enhancement_backlog.detail: Run with --allow-writes against a disposable Supabase branch DB (create_branch) so POST/PUT/DELETE lineage is captured without touching production.

enhancement_backlog.title: Smarter mock inputs (schema-example + real-row hydration)
enhancement_backlog.detail: Compute endpoints fail on naive mocks (None into arithmetic). Use pydantic field examples/constraints and hydrate request bodies from real list-endpoint rows.

enhancement_backlog.title: Contract assertions per transaction
enhancement_backlog.detail: Beyond 'did it run', assert output schema validity, no NaN/Inf in numeric KPIs, and lineage completeness (every output field traces to a source). Turns lineage into a regression gate.

enhancement_backlog.title: Frontend lineage layer
enhancement_backlog.detail: Drive the 816 React routes headless; capture network → rendered KPIs and stitch to the backend lineage for true source→screen lineage.

enhancement_backlog.title: Deep-trace mode for 3 capped endpoints
enhancement_backlog.detail: Some call trees hit node/depth caps (e.g. portfolio analysis). Offer an opt-in uncapped trace for those flows.

enhancement_backlog.title: Pin fastapi/starlette (route-registration regression)
enhancement_backlog.detail: Installed fastapi 0.137.1 / starlette 0.52.1 drifted from pinned 0.110.1 / 0.37.2 and silently break include_router. Restore pins; add a CI smoke test asserting /api/v1 route count > N.

enhancement_backlog.title: Run the sweep in CI nightly
enhancement_backlog.detail: Read-only sweep + dashboard artifact on each main build; diff pass/fail and provenance vs the prior run to catch data/logic drift.
